steps.title: Identify the correction
steps.content: The sentence first says Chaucer did not write in Modern English, then gives the true alternative: he wrote in Middle English. The transition must signal correction or substitution.

steps.title: Rule out unrelated links
steps.content: B signals sequence, but the sentence is not listing events in order. C signals cause and effect, but the second clause is not a result of the first. D signals similarity, while the clauses correct one idea with another. The answer is A.
